figures.caption: Figure 1: Longitudinal scRNA sequencing of the mouse lung during spontaneous fibrosis resolution.

Figure 5: Lung epithelial cells are enriched for pro-regenerative and pro-resolution pathways during spontaneous fibrosis resolution. (A) UMAP of epithelial cell subclusters. (B) Dot plot of representative markers for each epithelial subset. (C) Cluster graph displaying longitudinal cell type composition of epithelial subtypes. (D) GSEA of top enriched pathways among lung epithelial cells. E-G: Longitudinal GSEA of FGF (E), HGF/MET (F), and cAMP signaling and related pathways in AT1 and AT2 cells.

Figure 2: Relative intercellular signaling strength, cross-talk, and pathway enrichment among lung cells during fibrosis resolution. (A) Dot plot depicting relative incoming and outgoing interaction strength by all annotated cell types. (B) Heat map depicting relative number of interactions between sender cell types (y-axis) and receiver cell types (x-axis). (C) Heat map of top enriched pathways among fibroblast, type I (AT1), type II (AT2) alveolar epithelial cells, and alveolar macrophages (AMs).
